nodes.context: Street gang based in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, involved in weapons and drug trafficking.
New York-based gang; a former member allegedly co-founded the Dixon Bloods.

edges.evidence_quote: Unconfirmed rumours state that one of the founding members of the gang was a former member of a New York-based gang known as G-Shine Bloods, who had relocated to the neighborhood in the early 2000s.
edges.context: A former member of G-Shine Bloods allegedly co-founded the Dixon Bloods, indicating a structural link.
